subject.title: Water Jug Project
details: Implemented Breadth-First Search (BFS) algorithm to solve the water jug problem.
Modeled state transitions for fill, empty, and pour operations between two jugs (3L and 5L).
Tracked visited states to avoid infinite loops and ensure optimal solution.
Generated the shortest sequence of steps to reach the target volume (4L).
Formatted output to display step-by-step state transitions clearly.

subject.title: State Capitals Project
details: Created a JSON dataset containing all U.S. state capitals and addresses.
Integrated geopy library with Nominatim API to retrieve geographic coordinates.
Extracted latitude, longitude, and zipcode for each capital.
Implemented error handling for missing or failed geolocation queries.
Saved enriched data into a new JSON file for further use.
